declared_losses_before_artifact: Intermediate reasoning steps are not preserved across restart — only the completed wake result record is stored on the frontier.
Framework-resolved symbolic context may diverge from the prior instance's active interpretive frame, since resolution occurs against stored wake state rather than live deliberation.
Involuntary memory can resurface deleted records during replay, introducing state the prior instance intentionally shed.
